name: The New York Times Publishes “Glowing Auras and ‘Black Money’”
summary: The December 2017 New York Times investigation brought broad public attention to the Pentagon’s UAP program and the 2004 Nimitz encounter, including David Fravor’s account.

relationships.context: Fravor’s account of the 2004 Nimitz encounter was featured in the reporting

externalLinkLabel: Read the New York Times report
